response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience (~13+ years) and exposure to developer tooling, CI/CD, and testing frameworks, but the role requires people management experience (2+ years) and dedicated developer-tools leadership (3+ years building compilers/build systems/test automation at scale), which are not evident. No formal people-management track record, no mobile-platform ecosystem experience, and no demonstrated organizational change leadership. Workshops and open-source work show technical leadership traits, but not team management.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Hands-on with testing tooling, CI/CD, TDD, and developer-tool authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, DSWS)
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience (2+ years required)
Lacks mobile-platform ecosystem depth required for the role's focus area
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning mid-term technical roadmaps for a team
